action.reasoning: Observation: DINOv2 linear probe reaches new best 19.3% target acc (source val 74.5% still rising slowly at end of 10ep); each epoch ~13.4min so ~2ep possible in remaining 28.5min. Analysis: Further optimization on current strong SSL backbone + continued high grayscale aug should help bridge to Quickdraw line drawings without new model. Decision: Update train.py to resume from best.pt (load module state, new AdamW+cosine at low LR=2e-5 for 2 epochs), keep strong augs, run training then submit_eval on updated checkpoint; no predict.py change needed.
